experiences.title: French/English Tutor

experiences.title: Teacher Assistant
experiences.description: Volunteered as an english teacher assistant for young vietnamese children

experiences.title: Volunteer
experiences.description: I had the pleasure of working with The Grassmaket community project for just under a year. Once or twice a week I would help make and serve food to the members of the community. This organisation helps bring together disadvantaged individuals and enables them to take part in various projects such as carpentery, computing, cooking, gardening and much more.

education.school: The London School of Economics and Political Science (LSE)

volunteer_work.title: Teaching Assistant
volunteer_work.description: Whilst travelling through Vietnam I volunteered at a school called Maison Chance in Ho Chi Minh City. With a good understanding of languages, I was quickly able to get the children there to learn basic English. It was incredibly rewarding and an experience that added great value to my personal and professional life.
